title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, push and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; chat, embed, pull, push models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM & embedding components.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, RAG, plugins, admin panel).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Enhanced TUI client for Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-chat (React component)
summary: Lightweight React component for chatting with Ollama backends.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor and chat with code using Ollama.

title: ollama-models-registry
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama-3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Telegram bot that chats with local Ollama instances; supports groups & inline queries.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team: generators, embedders & chatters for pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-on-bentoml
summary: BentoML service wrapper to serve Ollama models with auto-scaling REST & gRPC endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ and Unity.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Experimental Discord bot from Ollama team for chatting with local models in servers.
